hero.headline: A decentralized, efficient, and robust foundation for humanity's information
hero.description: Filecoin is the world's largest decentralized storage network, built to keep data secure, verifiable, and free from centralized control.

metadata.title: Filecoin | World's Largest Decentralized Storage Network for Humanity's Data
metadata.description: Preserve humanity's most important information on Filecoin, the decentralized storage network with verifiable integrity, global redundancy, and no centralized control. Build apps, store data securely, or become a storage provider today.

trustedBy.title: Join industry leaders storing with Filecoin

storageCapacity.subTitle: network storage capacity
storageCapacity.description: Enough to store Wikipedia's text 22 million times over

smartContracts.subTitle: smart contracts
smartContracts.description: Deployed via the Filecoin Virtual Machine (FVM)

reshapingData.title: Filecoin is reshaping how the world stores data
reshapingData.subTitle: A better foundation for the next generation of the web.
reshapingData.paragraph1: Today, a small handful of corporations control most of the world's data, creating centralized gatekeepers that introduce single points of failure.
reshapingData.paragraph2: Filecoin offers a fundamentally different approach to data storage: distributing data across a decentralized, global network secured by cryptographic proofs, ensuring greater security and resilience.
reshapingData.paragraph3: From cultural archives to scientific research, petabytes of data are already stored on Filecoin. The decentralized model empowers users with true autonomy over their information, building a foundation for a more open, resilient, and user-controlled web.

ipfs.title: The incentive layer for IPFS
ipfs.paragraph1: Filecoin adds incentivized, persistent storage to the InterPlanetary File System (IPFS), a peer-to-peer network for content-addressable data, creating a powerful, versatile, and long-term home for data.
ipfs.paragraph2: Filecoin makes it easy for IPFS users to reliably store their data directly on the Filecoin network. The result is a decentralized, storage layer opening up an entirely new class of applications and use cases.

comparison.title: How Filecoin storage stacks up
comparison.description: How decentralized storage compares to traditional cloud storage

buildForFuture.title: Open, scalable, and built for the future
buildForFuture.subTitle: A decentralized, verifiable storage layer that scales effortlessly.
buildForFuture.description: Power chain storage, dApps, data-heavy SaaS platforms, immutable archives, and beyond. Accelerate development with open source tools, native IPFS integration, cross-chain data bridges, and FEVM for programmable smart contracts. Build without compromise, knowing you control your data, not centralized gatekeepers.

latestNews.title: Latest news
latestNews.description: Insights, updates, ecosystem spotlights, and community stories, directly from the teams building Filecoin.

community.title: Join a vibrant community
community.description: Be part of the movement to build a decentralized, efficient, and robust foundation for humanity's information.

images.panel: A man speaks into a microphone during a discussion panel, smiling while other participants listen attentively beside him.

metadata.title: Filecoin Blog | Latest News, Updates & Ecosystem Insights
metadata.description: Dive into Filecoin's blog for ecosystem metrics, news on verifiable hot storage, cross-chain bridges, events, and growth insights. Stay informed on decentralized storage innovations driving AI, crypto, and data resilience.

metadata.title: Filecoin Community | Connect, Learn & Build Together
metadata.description: Join the Filecoin community—connect with developers, join events, and access resources to collaborate on building the future of decentralized storage.

hero.title: Build, connect and grow with the Filecoin community
hero.description: A global network of builders, researchers, advocates and creators is shaping the future of Filecoin. Plug into the community and start contributing in your own way.

events.title: Events & meetups
events.description: Attend upcoming hackathons, summits, and meetups.

orbit.title: Orbit Ambassadors
orbit.description: Advocate for Filecoin, host events, and grow the ecosystem around the world.

build.title: Build with Filecoin
build.description: Guides, APIs, and tools to store data, retrieve it, and build on Filecoin.

ecosystemGroups.title: Ecosystem groups
ecosystemGroups.description: Filecoin is open-source and community-driven. Explore groups advancing the protocol and building the tools that power its ecosystem.

filecoinFoundation.description: Network governance, Filecoin Plus, and grants.

polaris.description: Protocol Labs dev guild and hackathons.

connectCommunity.title: Connect with the community
connectCommunity.description: Connect with a vibrant network of developers building on Filecoin. Connect, collaborate, and grow with the ecosystem.

networkUpgrades.title: Network upgrades
networkUpgrades.description: Filecoin is governed through an open, community-driven process where technical decisions are discussed in public and implemented through regular upgrades that keep the network secure and evolving.

nv27.title: NV27 Golden Week
nv27.description: This upgrade delivered protocol cleanups and enhancements, including cryptographic precompiles for the Filecoin Ethereum Virtual Machine (FEVM), smart contract notifications for Direct Data Onboarding, Fast Finality on Filecoin (F3)-compatible snapshot formatting, and a new deposit requirement for storage provider (SP) creation.
nv27.alt: Filecoin Network Upgrade announcement for nv27 Golden Week, with gold-texture background artwork.

nv28.title: NV28 Upcoming
nv28.description: NV28 is expected to deliver continued protocol improvements and ecosystem enhancements, focusing on core network operations, developer experience, and storage provider functionality while supporting Filecoin's broader roadmap for scalability and security.
nv28.alt: Filecoin Network Upgrade announcement for nv28, with cosmic background artwork.

latestNews.title: Latest news
latestNews.description: Insights, updates, ecosystem spotlights, and community stories, directly from the teams building Filecoin.

exploreEcosystem.title: Explore the ecosystem
exploreEcosystem.description: Visit Filecoin Foundation's Ecosystem Explorer to discover Filecoin projects, get inspired by what others are building, and find your place in the Filecoin ecosystem.

metadata.title: What Is Filecoin? | Decentralized Storage Explained
metadata.description: Learn how Filecoin's decentralized storage network works, what it's used for, and why it's a foundation for a more resilient internet.

hero.title: The authenticity layer of a more resilient internet
hero.description: Filecoin is the world's largest decentralized storage network. By leveraging cryptographic verification and global redundancy, Filecoin safeguards humanity's information, keeping it free from centralized control.

whatIsFilecoin.title: What is Filecoin?
whatIsFilecoin.subTitle: A decentralized alternative to today's storage solutions.
whatIsFilecoin.paragraph1: Filecoin is a decentralized alternative to today's storage solutions, offering a better foundation for humanity's information.
whatIsFilecoin.paragraph2: A handful of corporations currently control most of the world's data. This centralized model creates gatekeepers, introduces single points of failure, and reduces transparency.
whatIsFilecoin.paragraph3: Filecoin offers a fundamentally different approach to data storage by distributing data across a decentralized, global network, secured by cryptographic proofs.

usedFor.title: What is Filecoin used for?
usedFor.description: From archival backups to Web3 and AI apps, Filecoin offers decentralized, secure, and verifiable storage at scale.

web3Apps.title: Web3 apps & AI datasets
web3Apps.description: Powering the data layer for NFTs, video streaming, AI training datasets, and dApps.

backups.title: Backups & archival storage
backups.description: Secure, long-term storage for mission-critical data.

culturalArchives.title: Cultural archives
culturalArchives.description: Preserving humanity's knowledge and records for the long term.

scientificDatasets.title: Scientific datasets
scientificDatasets.description: Enabling resilient access to genomics, public research, and large-scale scientific data.

howDataMoves.title: How data moves through Filecoin
howDataMoves.description: Users and storage providers interact through onchain deals. The blockchain records and monitors these deals, using publicly verifiable proofs to ensure the data is correctly stored and accessible.

decentralizedByDesign.title: Decentralized by design
decentralizedByDesign.description: The Filecoin network provides decentralized storage secured by cryptographic proofs and economic incentives, transforming data storage into open, verifiable infrastructure.

onchainProof.title: Onchain proof of storage
onchainProof.description: Filecoin uses two proofs to ensure data integrity: <porepLink>Proof of Replication</porepLink> verifies a unique copy of data exists, and <postLink>Proof of Spacetime</postLink> confirms it remains stored over time.

poweredByIncentives.title: Powered by incentives
poweredByIncentives.description: The <filLink>Filecoin token (FIL)</filLink> powers the network's economy. Clients pay in FIL to store data, while providers earn FIL by offering reliable services. Providers must lock FIL as collateral and earn rewards by submitting valid proofs.

verifiableRetrieval.title: Verifiable retrieval
verifiableRetrieval.description: With <focLink>Filecoin Onchain Cloud</focLink>, retrieval performance is provable onchain, turning speed and reliability into measurable, verifiable metrics.

builtForScale.title: Built for scale
builtForScale.description: The network's infrastructure is designed to support exabyte-scale datasets and long-term preservation with built-in global distribution and redundancy.

protocol.title: Learn about the Filecoin protocol
protocol.description: For technically curious people who want to go deeper into how Filecoin actually works.

contentAddressing.title: Content addressing
contentAddressing.description: Files are retrieved via content identifiers (CIDs) instead of location-based URLs prone to deterioration.

storageDeals.title: Storage & retrieval deals
storageDeals.description: Clients make programmable deals with independent storage providers in a global marketplace.

proofsVerification.title: Proofs & verification
proofsVerification.description: Providers must cryptographically prove they are storing data.

tokenIncentives.title: Token Incentives (FIL)
tokenIncentives.description: The native token aligns economic incentives and rewards useful storage over time.

fvm.title: Filecoin Virtual Machine (FVM)
fvm.description: The smart-contract layer that lets developers build logic, automation, and apps on top of Filecoin storage.

filecoinPlus.title: Filecoin Plus (Fil+)
filecoinPlus.description: An incentive system that aims to increase the amount of useful data stored on the Filecoin network.

resilientInternet.title: Be a part of a more resilient internet
resilientInternet.description: Filecoin is more than storage; it's an innovative, open ecosystem built to preserve humanity's information.

metadata.title: Store Data on Filecoin | Secure, Verifiable Decentralized Storage Solutions
metadata.description: Securely store big data on Filecoin with tamper-proof integrity, compliance standards, predictable pricing, and infinite scalability. Choose from trusted providers for resilient, censorship-resistant storage without hidden fees.

hero.title: Decentralized, secure storage for data that matters
hero.description: Filecoin is a dynamic, decentralized storage network that keeps your data secure, verifiable, and always under your control — powering solutions from enterprise platforms to simple onramps.

trustedBy.title: Join industry leaders storing with Filecoin

storeOnFilecoin.title: Store on Filecoin
storeOnFilecoin.description: Find the perfect storage solution for your data on Filecoin.

notSure.title: Not sure what storage solution to choose?
notSure.description: Tell us about your needs, and we'll guide you to the Filecoin solution that fits best.

akave.description: Enterprise-grade hot storage for AI & data lakes.

aurora.description: Enterprise-ready infrastructure for secure, large-scale AI and data workloads.

cidgravity.description: Simple decentralized storage backend for Nextcloud.

filOne.description: S3-compatible object storage for large datasets.

filecoinOnchainCloud.description: Programmable cloud infrastructure with verifiable storage, retrieval, and payments.
keyFeatures: Verifiable storage with Proof of Data Possession (PDP)
Programmable payments via smart contracts (Filecoin Pay)

storacha.description: High-speed hot storage for fast data retrieval.
keyFeatures: Optimized for content delivery and streaming

metadata.title: Build on Filecoin | Scalable Decentralized Storage for Developers & AI
metadata.description: Empower your apps with Filecoin's programmable, verifiable storage. Integrate AI datasets, dApps, cross-chain bridges, and more using open-source tools, FVM smart contracts, and IPFS for resilient, permissionless development.

hero.title: Build on Filecoin: open, scalable, verifiable storage
hero.description: Filecoin is a programmable, permissionless network from the ground up with cryptographic verification and global redundancy. Integrate decentralized storage that scales with your needs and safeguards data integrity at every layer.
hero.focTitle: Verifiable onchain services with transparent storage, retrieval, and payments
hero.focDescription1: Filecoin Onchain Cloud allows developers to build composable and verifiable services onchain where storage, pinning, retrieval, and payments are transparent, programmable, and interoperable by default.
hero.focDescription2: This provides direct, trustless entry points to the Filecoin network so developers can connect data, services, and applications without running their own infrastructure.
hero.focCta: Get started with Filecoin Onchain Cloud

builtOnFilecoin.title: Built on Filecoin
builtOnFilecoin.description: Discover tools and applications powered by Filecoin.

lighthouse.description: Perpetual storage on the Filecoin network, allowing users to store their files long-term at a fixed price.

glif.description: Developer tools and DeFi infrastructure for building, managing, and transacting on Filecoin.

recall.description: Recall lets AI agents prove their intelligence, compete for rewards and reputation, and surface top performers across specialized skills.

huddle01.description: Built on Filecoin, Huddle01 is a decentralized, real-time communication network with live audio and video software development kit for the web and mobile.

whatIsFilecoin.title: What is Filecoin?
whatIsFilecoin.description: Understand the core concepts behind decentralized storage, proofs, and data markets.

builderCookbook.title: Builder Cookbook
builderCookbook.description: Step-by-step guides for common tasks like storing files, retrieving data, and building applications.

filFrame.title: FIL Frame
filFrame.description: An open-source framework from the FIL Builders community designed to help developers quickly bootstrap Filecoin-powered applications.

decentralizedStorageApps.title: Decentralized storage applications
decentralizedStorageApps.description: Applications that store and retrieve data on Filecoin rather than relying on centralized cloud providers, such as data pipelines, file hosting platforms, and dataset archives.

aiDataPipelines.title: AI data pipelines
aiDataPipelines.description: Store training datasets, inference results, and agent outputs on verifiable decentralized infrastructure.

web3Infrastructure.title: Web3 infrastructure
web3Infrastructure.description: Build services, APIs, and middleware powered by decentralized storage.

dataVerificationServices.title: Data verification services
dataVerificationServices.description: Use Filecoin proofs to guarantee that important data is preserved and verifiable.

buildDecentralizedFileStorageApp.title: Build a decentralized file storage app
buildDecentralizedFileStorageApp.description: A step-by-step tutorial showing how to build a decentralized storage application using Filecoin and the Synapse SDK.
buildDecentralizedFileStorageApp.cta: Build a file storage app with Filecoin

filecoinPinDeveloperGuide.title: Filecoin Pin developer guide
filecoinPinDeveloperGuide.description: A comprehensive introduction to Filecoin Pin and how web developers can use it to store data on decentralized infrastructure.
filecoinPinDeveloperGuide.cta: Read the Filecoin Pin developer guide

trustlessAiAgentsWithFilecoin.title: Trustless AI agents with Filecoin
trustlessAiAgentsWithFilecoin.description: Learn how to combine AI agents and decentralized storage to create verifiable AI systems.
trustlessAiAgentsWithFilecoin.cta: Build trustless AI agents with Filecoin

filecoinOnchainCloudExplained.title: Filecoin Onchain Cloud explained
filecoinOnchainCloudExplained.description: Overview of the decentralized cloud stack and services powering Filecoin developer infrastructure.

buildWithFilecoinOnchainCloud.title: Build with Filecoin Onchain Cloud (Video Series)
buildWithFilecoinOnchainCloud.description: A video playlist walkthrough of the Filecoin Onchain Cloud developer stack. Learn how to build decentralized storage applications, manage datasets, and integrate Filecoin services into real-world architectures.

whatIsFilecoinOnchainCloud.title: What is Filecoin Onchain Cloud?
whatIsFilecoinOnchainCloud.description: What makes Filecoin Onchain Cloud different from AWS or Google Cloud? In this video, we're diving into how Filecoin is building a decentralized cloud platform with verifiable storage, proof-based payments, and a global network of providers.

storageAndPaymentFlow.title: Storage and payment flow
storageAndPaymentFlow.description: Ever wondered how decentralized storage actually works end-to-end? In this video, we're walking through the complete storage and payment flow on Filecoin Onchain Cloud from setting up payments to uploading your data, proving storage, and downloading it later.

understandingVerification.title: Understanding verification
understandingVerification.description: Why does PDP matter? It's the heartbeat that proves your data is actually safe. In this video, we're breaking down Proof of Data Possession and why it's the core verification mechanism behind Filecoin Onchain Cloud.

documentation.title: Documentation
documentation.description: Comprehensive guides and tutorials to build on Filecoin.

testFILFaucet.title: testFIL Faucet
testFILFaucet.description: Instantly access test tokens for development and experimentation.

rpcEndpoints.title: RPC Endpoints
rpcEndpoints.description: Reliable endpoints for connecting your dApps to the Filecoin network.

filecoinSol.title: Filecoin.sol
filecoinSol.description: Solidity libraries for seamless integration with the Filecoin Virtual Machine.

getInvolved.title: Get involved
getInvolved.description: Whether you're just getting started or looking to deepen your contributions, there are many ways to get involved.

applyGrant.title: Apply for a grant
applyGrant.description: Secure funding to support your Filecoin-based project or research.

retroPGF.title: Explore Retroactive Public Goods Funding
retroPGF.description: Get rewarded for impactful, open-source contributions that advance the Filecoin ecosystem.

orbitAmbassador.title: Become an Orbit ambassador
orbitAmbassador.description: Join the Orbit community to advocate for decentralized tech, support new builders, and grow the Filecoin movement globally.

communityEvents.title: Attend community events
communityEvents.description: Connect with builders, researchers, and advocates at hackathons, meetups, and summits around the world.

metadata.title: Filecoin Case Studies | Real-World Decentralized Storage Success
metadata.description: Explore Filecoin case studies showcasing how organizations use decentralized storage for scalability, security, and innovation across industries.

hero.title: Powering the preservation of critical datasets
hero.description: From AI datasets to government archives, leading institutions trust Filecoin to securely and resiliently store their most valuable datasets.

featured.title: Organizations preserving their data on Filecoin
featured.description: Read full case studies of some of the organizations using Filecoin to preserve their data.

upcoming.title: More datasets (case studies coming soon)
upcoming.description: Discover additional teams leveraging Filecoin for data preservation. Full case studies are coming soon.

cta.title: Preserve your most important data with Filecoin
cta.description: Join the organizations already protecting their most valuable datasets on the Filecoin network.

metadata.title: Become a Filecoin Storage Provider | Earn Rewards in Decentralized Network
metadata.description: Join the Filecoin network as a storage provider to power global decentralized infrastructure. Use your data center to earn FIL rewards, diversify revenue, and scale with demand while preserving vital data in a permissionless ecosystem.

hero.title: Power the world's largest decentralized storage network
hero.description: Play a vital role in the future of decentralized storage. Become a Filecoin storage provider and contribute capacity to a global system preserving humanity's most important information.
hero.bookCall: Book a call with the onboarding team

logoSection.title: Join a global network of storage providers

gettingStarted.title: Getting started with PDP storage
gettingStarted.description: Running a warm storage node using Proof of Data Possession (PDP) is the easiest way to begin offering Filecoin storage — no expensive hardware or long-term collateral required.

lowestHardware.title: Lowest hardware costs
lowestHardware.description: Warm storage requires minimal infrastructure, making it affordable to start offering storage with just basic compute and disk.

fastestPath.title: Fastest path to becoming a SP
fastestPath.description: Get online quickly with a simple setup and no sealing hardware — perfect for testing, learning, and onboarding your first clients.

idealForNew.title: Ideal for new operators and small teams
idealForNew.description: Operate a reliable, permissionless storage service without managing complex pipelines or large-scale hardware.

scalingOperations.title: Scaling your storage operations
scalingOperations.description: If you're already running a warm storage node and want to expand, Filecoin supports enterprise-grade proofs like Proof of Replication (PoRep) and Proof of Spacetime (PoSt) — enabling high-capacity, production-scale storage operations. Scaling involves:

sealingHardware.title: Dedicated sealing hardware (CPU/GPU)
sealingHardware.description: High-performance machines designed to handle sealing workloads reliably and at scale.

storagePipelines.title: High-performance storage pipelines
storagePipelines.description: Optimized data paths that maintain consistent throughput and stable thermal performance.

distributedSealing.title: Distributed sealing systems
distributedSealing.description: Run parallelized sealing workflows with networked workers and production-grade tooling.

deepSupport.title: Deep support from Filecoin solution architects
deepSupport.description: Get expert guidance on architecture, scaling strategy, and best practices for large deployments.

needHelp.title: Need help choosing the right architecture?
needHelp.description: Our team can guide you through PoRep requirements, recommended hardware, sealing pipelines, and operational best practices.
needHelp.bookCall: Book a call with the onboarding team

metadata.title: Talk to a Filecoin Storage Expert
metadata.description: Share your details and our team will help you evaluate the best Filecoin storage solution for your use case.
